title: limonium vulgare subsp. angustifolium
intro: Limonium vulgare subsp. angustifolium, also known as sea lavender, is a flowering plant species within the statice family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of sea lavender include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and soothing skin irritations. Sea lavender can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
